title: kuepferia leucantha
intro: Kuepferia leucantha is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family, and is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as limonene and pinene, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Kuepferia leucantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for medicinal use, and its leaves and roots are also used in traditional cooking and as a flavoring agent.
